name: First-row CKM unitarity (Cabibbo-angle anomaly)
requirement: Any candidate framework must reproduce the unitarity sum |V_ud|^2 + |V_us|^2 + |V_ub|^2 = 1 of the first row of the CKM matrix. Tension at the ~3 sigma level: |V_ud|^2 + |V_us|^2 + |V_ub|^2 - 1 = -0.0017 +/- 0.0006, with internal disagreement among different determinations of V_us and V_ud.

regime.description: Charged-current hadronic transitions: super-allowed nuclear beta decays (V_ud), kaon and pion semileptonic decays (V_us). Sensitive to BSM modifications of the W-quark coupling at the TeV scale.

current_bound.experiment: Combined nuclear beta decay (V_ud) + K_l3, K_l2, tau decays (V_us) + B -> X_u l nu (V_ub)
current_bound.reference: Cirigliano, Crivellin, Hoferichter, Moulson, 'Scrutinizing CKM unitarity with a new measurement of the K_mu3 / K_mu2 branching fraction', PLB 838, 137748 (2023), arXiv:2208.11707; Particle Data Group 2024

what_it_excludes: Could be a sign of BSM physics in W-quark coupling (modified V_ud or V_us) or of unaccounted hadronic / radiative-correction systematics. Constrains right-handed W couplings, leptoquarks, and modified Fermi constant. Resolution requires improved nuclear-structure corrections in super-allowed beta decays and lattice-QCD form factors for kaon decays.

parameterization.name: SMEFT operators modifying charged currents: O_lq^(3) (left-left), O_phi q^(3) (Higgs-current), and right-handed couplings O_phi ud.
parameterization.reference: Falkowski, Gonzalez-Alonso, Naviliat-Cuncic, JHEP 04, 126 (2021), arXiv:2010.13797; Crivellin and Hoferichter, PRL 125, 111801 (2020), arXiv:2002.07184.
parameterization.summary: BSM contributions appear as effective shifts in V_ud, V_us extracted from different processes, breaking the apparent unitarity sum.

procedural.predicted_observable: Effective V_ud_eff, V_us_eff measured in different processes; framework must give consistent values in all.
procedural.bound_in_parameterization: |C_lq^(3) / Lambda^2| <~ (5 TeV)^-2; specific operator combinations probed at sub-permille level.
framework_inputs: Wilson coefficients of the relevant SMEFT operators in the quark sector.
Inclusion of QED radiative corrections and electroweak running.

primary_references.citation: Cirigliano, Crivellin, Hoferichter, Moulson, 'Scrutinizing CKM unitarity with a new measurement of the K_mu3 / K_mu2 branching fraction', PLB 838, 137748 (2023)
Crivellin and Hoferichter, 'beta decays as sensitive probes of lepton flavor universality', PRL 125, 111801 (2020)
Particle Data Group, 'Review of Particle Physics', 2024
